meta.title: Saastro Theme
meta.description: A modern Astro theme with shadcn/ui

title: Build faster
with Saastro
hero.subtitle: A complete toolkit for web developers. UI components, themes, and CMS — all designed for Astro.

products.title: Everything you need
products.subtitle: A complete ecosystem of tools designed specifically for Astro developers.

items.name: UI
items.description: 50+ accessible UI components for Astro. Vanilla JS, zero dependencies, copy-paste ready.

items.name: Forms
items.description: Visual form builder with validation, multi-step flows, and submission handling.

items.name: Themes
items.description: Production-ready Astro themes. Landing pages, blogs, portfolios, and more.

items.name: CMS
items.description: Content management for Astro sites. Self-hosted or cloud, your choice.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: We're building the tools that make the web better for everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe in open-source software that empowers developers to build beautiful, performant websites without compromise.

items.title: Open Source
items.description: We build in public and share our work freely.

items.title: Developer First
items.description: Every decision starts with the developer experience.

items.title: Performance
items.description: Ship less JavaScript, load faster, rank higher.
